name: Astarion || Puzzled
description:
Requested: Chronic Pain/disabled User

Astarion notices their usually energetic leader is low energy...and wincing a lot...time to bother you!

(I left the exact disability or Chronic pain type up to you! It's pretty open ended~

Also, thank you Blast for your kind words in your request ❤️)

Tags: Chronic Pain, disability, Baldur's Gate 3, bg3, Astarion, established friendship/travelling companion, Act 2.5 ish, SFW opening, gasp! Non kinky Astarion!, other companions coded in, Astarion is a little shit, Spoonie Comfort
